data.body: Implementation complete. 4 commits on frac-33-apply-visit (off frac-32-audit-visit): (1) lattice catchup, (2) declare 4 house-visit-* tokens in src/index.css @theme inline, (3) NeighborhoodPage <main> surface migration including the load-bearing text-foreground→text-house-visit-light-foreground cascade fix + drop of style prop, (4) text-white sites (L30/L33/L37/L56) → text-house-visit-light-foreground + SectorHeader prop (L20) raw hex → var(--color-house-visit-deep) + MandelbrotCorners (L29) FRAC-42 pairing addition + PretextParagraph (L54) GAP color-only. Body typography NEAR sites L33/L37 sized up text-xs→.text-body per audit row. Grep checks: zero text-white/decoration-white/border-white/bg-white/bg-black/#fff/#889460 in NeighborhoodPage.tsx; only #4A5A30 remaining is L14 FractalPattern (EXCLUDED row); zero house-neighborhood-* slugs anywhere in src/. pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm test shows the 4 documented baseline failures only (footer italic, footer Jacquard, nav mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen) — failure modes match pre-PR baseline; no regressions.

REVIEW PASS — implementation matches plan and audit exactly. Verified cold against .lattice/notes/audits/visit-audit.md, .lattice/plans/task_01KTJQF22TRG1HBDF96DE3GBCZ.md, and git diff origin/frac-32-audit-visit...HEAD. (1) Token declarations: all 4 house-visit-* siblings in src/index.css @theme inline; comment block credits FRAC-33 with paired-from-day-one continuation note; values EXACT match DESIGN.md house palette table. (2) Load-bearing cascade fix verified in diff: L13 text-foreground→text-house-visit-light-foreground, style prop removed, bg-house-visit-light added, selection chrome preserved verbatim — commit 970b263 explicitly documents the FRAC-42 mispairing correction. (3) All 4 text-white sites migrated to text-house-visit-light-foreground (L30, L33, L37, L56). (4) Body cluster L33/L37 typography sized up text-xs→.text-body per audit NEAR→MIGRATE row. (5) SectorHeader L20 raw hex→CSS var. (6) MandelbrotCorners L29 FRAC-42 pairing addition; bg-foreground/[0.03] + border-foreground/20 preserved verbatim per audit EXACT no-op. (7) PretextParagraph L54 GAP color-only — Pretext rendering + size prop untouched. (8) Button wrapper L60 unchanged. (9) FractalPattern L14 EXCLUDED row left intact. House slug binding verified: zero house-neighborhood-* anywhere in src/. No out-of-scope files touched. pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm test = 4 baseline failures only (footer italic, footer Jacquard, nav mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen) with failure modes matching pre-PR baseline; no regressions. PRD re-read per CLAUDE.md — mobile-first 375px respected, body cluster size-up improves mobile readability, house page architecture aligned with FRAC-22 site architecture. Outcome: PASS, ready for done.
